content:
<task>
write a children's book that gently teaches agentic harness engineering. Use a whimsical forest-animal metaphor and beginner-friendly explanations, inspired by the high-level concept of Gently Down the Stream: A Gentle Introduction to Apache Kafka by Mitch Seymour, without imitating its prose.
</task>
